query:

  ADD COLUMN aspectRatio enum('landscape','portrait') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'portrait' AFTER market,
  ADD COLUMN genre varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'romance' AFTER style,
  ADD COLUMN totalEpisodes int DEFAULT 20 AFTER genre,
  ADD COLUMN status enum('draft','in_progress','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' AFTER totalEpisodes
